g.text: gold body + black bands · actual size
— lay these across the gold body.
On the finished bee they sit
behind the body, one each side.
gold striped body · ginger thorax · pale wings
· Spot it on bins, bollards and
she does all the hive's jobs.
lay the pieces on the mat
it's a puzzle, not a glue-up
Slot a wing out each side
Angle the wings a little each
time — no two builds are alike.
A Giant Insect World felt puzzle
build it · take it apart · build it again

svg.text: Print A4 landscape at 100% (actual size) · fold into 6 × 2 where the edge marks line up · cover = top half of row 2, column 5
